name: Sitemap
description: Automatic XML sitemap, robots.txt, from published Pages, Blog, Events, Gallery and Videos. Fixed two real bugs: blog posts were queried from a nonexistent 'blog_posts' table (the real table is 'posts'), so they silently never appeared in the sitemap; and multi-language Pages contributed the same bare-path URL once per lang row instead of one distinct URL per locale (bare path for the default locale, /xx/ prefix for others, matching Config/Routes.php's own prefix-routing scheme).
author: Vertext
